subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I have read thy letter addressed to the dear Anton Effendi [3.5s]... ...Regarding the statement in The Hidden Words, that man must renounce his own self, the meaning is that he must renounce his inordinate desires
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک المرسل الی انطون افندی العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
